## What and why
What this changes and the reason for it. Link the issue it addresses (open an issue
first - see CONTRIBUTING.md).

## How to verify
The exact commands or steps that show it behaves correctly, not just that it runs.

## Checklist
- [ ] Every new number traces to a source (or explicit derivation) with a
      `REFERENCES.md` entry in the same change - no assumed values.
- [ ] End-to-end validation added or updated; the relevant `pytest` suite is green.
- [ ] The model stays a pure, seeded, deterministic fold; pimas only as the skin.
- [ ] No em-dash (U+2014) and no emoji; the change stays within one module's directory.

## Notes
Anything a reviewer should know.
